text: Perfect! Now I have good references for the Java logo and alien living room aesthetics. Let me create this complex, multi-layered scene for you.

artifact.image_name: Alien Watching Java Hot Tub Scene
artifact.prompt_text:
A photorealistic scene with multiple layers: In the foreground, a detailed alien creature sits in a futuristic living room, watching a massive screen TV. The TV screen shows a behind-the-scenes film production setup where a man with wavy long hair wearing a cut-off shirt is interacting with a 3D animated cartoon comedy scene. 

The animated scene on the screen depicts: A cheerful 3D cartoon character named Ki and his Asian wife with short hair, both modestly dressed, relaxing in an oversized coffee mug that serves as a hot tub. The mug has "JAVA" written on it in the style of the Java programming logo (red text, coffee cup design). Steam rises from the coffee-mug-hot-tub. A WhatsApp speech bubble floats near them with the text: "Not today, but we can talk tomorrow. Put on Cal. I'm in Java". In the background of the animated scene, there's a clear view of an Asian cityscape representing Java, Indonesia.

The composition shows: alien in living room (foreground) → watching huge TV screen → which displays the man with the green screen setup → interacting with the 3D animated cartoon of the couple in the Java mug hot tub with city view. Photorealistic rendering with clear depth layers, cinematic lighting, highly detailed textures.

text:
Perfect! I've created your creative multi-layered scene! 

The image shows:
- **Foreground**: A photorealistic alien in his futuristic living room, watching a huge screen TV
- **On the TV screen**: A behind-the-scenes production setup with a man with wavy long hair in a cut-off shirt
- **The animated scene**: Ki and his Asian wife with short hair, modestly enjoying a "hot tub" inside a giant Java coffee mug (with "JAVA" branding), complete with the WhatsApp speech bubble saying "Not today, but we can talk tomorrow. Put on Cal. I'm in Java"
- **Background of animation**: An Asian cityscape representing Java, Indonesia

The composition captures that fun meta-concept of layers within layers - the alien watching a behind-the-scenes of someone creating a 3D animated comedy scene, all with the clever Java coffee/location pun!
